fields.name: myplaceppn
fields.description: {"value":"BASE64-ENCODED TEXT PARCELNUMBER FOR USE IN QUERYING MYPLACE","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: parcel_owner
fields.description: {"value":"PRESENT OWNER OF PARCEL AS LISTED IN REAL PROPERTY SYSTEM","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: second_owner
fields.description: {"value":"ADDITIONAL OWNER AS LISTED IN REAL PROPERTY SYSTEM","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: property_class
fields.description: {"value":"PROPERTY CLASS CODE: \"A\" = AGRICULTURAL, \"B\" = LAND BANK, \"C\" = COMMERCIAL, \"E\" = EXEMPT, \"I\" = INDUSTRIAL, \"P\" = PUBLIC UTILITY, \"R\" = RESIDENTIAL, \"AE\" = AGRICULTURAL-EXEMPT, \"CE\" = COMMERCIAL-EXEMPT, \"IE\" = INDUSTRIAL-EXEMPT, \"RE\" = RESIDENTIAL-EXEMPT, \"H\" = HIGHWAY EXEMPT, \"M\" = MINERAL RIGHTS, \"LW\" = LISTED WITH","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: neighborhood_code
fields.description: {"value":"PROPERTIES ARE GROUPED INTO APPRAISAL NEIGHBORHOODS AND GIVEN A NEIGHBORHOOD CODE","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: tax_abatement
fields.description: {"value":"Tax Abatement: "CRA1" = COMMUNITY REINVESTMENT-1997, "CRA2" = COMMUNITY REINVESTMENT-1996, "EZ1" = ENT. ZONE-1989, "EZ2" = ENT. ZONE-1988, "URDC" = URBAN REDEVELOPMENT CORP., "TIF" = TAX INCREMENT FINANCE, "EPA" = ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION ABATEMENT, "OTHR" = OTHER, "NONE" = NONE, "Y" = YES","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: road_type
fields.description: {"value":"TYPE OF ROAD: \"N\" = NONE, \"UIM\" = UNIMPROVED, \"PV\" = PAVED, \"PS\" = PAPER STREET","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: sewer
fields.description: {"value":"TYPE OF SEWER: \"N\" = NONE, \"SNS\" = SANITARY AND STORM, \"SP\" = SEPTIC, \"SAN\" = SANITARY, \"ST\" = STORM, \"SPS\" = SEPTIC AND STORM","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: parcel_acreage
fields.description: {"value":"TOTAL PARCEL AREA IN ACRES, CALCULATED FROM PARCEL_LOT_SIZE","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: update_date
fields.description: {"value":"DATE THIS DATA WAS LAST UPDATED FROM SOURCE SYSTEMS","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: cur_tax_year
fields.description: {"value":"CURRENT TAX YEAR FOR WHICH VALUATIONS ARE CERTIFIED","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: prev_market_total
fields.description: {"value":"TAXABLE MARKET TOTAL OF PREVIOUS TAX YEAR","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: per_change_assess_total
fields.description: {"value":"PERCENT CHANGE ASSESSED VALUE YEAR OVER YEAR","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: yoy_tax_val_change
fields.description: {"value":"YEAR OVER YEAR TAXABLE MARKET VALUE CHANGE (TAX_MARKET_TOTAL - PREV_MARKET_TOTAL)","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: per_change_tax_total
fields.description: {"value":"PERCENT CHANGE TAXABLE MARKET VALUE YEAR OVER YEAR","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: total_net_delq_owed
fields.description: {"value":"TOTAL NET DELIQUENT OWED THIS TAX YEAR","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: total_net_delq_paid
fields.description: {"value":"TOTAL NET DELIQUENT PAID THIS TAX YEAR","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: taxbill_update_date
fields.description: {"value":"DATE THE TAXBILL DATA WAS LAST UPDATED FROM SOURCE SYSTEMS","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: last_edited_date
fields.description: {"value":"DATE PARCEL WAS LAST EDITED IN GIS","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: fo_pcl_active
fields.description: {"value":"FISCAL OFFICE PARCEL ACTIVE - AIR RIGHTS AND POINT PARCELS ONLY","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: fo_split_year
fields.description: {"value":"FISCAL OFFICE SPLIT YEAR - AIR RIGHTS AND POINT PARCELS ONLY","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: up_floor_name
fields.description: {"value":"UPPER FLOOR NAME - AIR RIGHTS PARCELS ONLY","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: dn_floor_name
fields.description: {"value":"LOWER FLOOR NAME - AIR RIGHTS PARCELS ONLY","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: std_deeded_owner
fields.description: {"value":"The owner of the parcel. Since owner names can be spelled many different ways in the county database, this field is standardized to correct common mispellings and letter patterns. Note: Not all owners are corrected by this standardization.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: mail_addr_all
fields.description: {"value":"Tax mailing address as provided by Cuyahoga County.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: std_property_address
fields.description: {"value":"Standardized address of the parcel. Standardized means there are only alphanumeric characters and no consecutive blanks.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: std_tax_mailing_address
fields.description: {"value":"Standardized tax mailing address of the parcel. Standardized address of the parcel. Standardized means there are only alphanumeric characters and no consecutive blanks.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: lastBuildingCodeViolationRecordId
fields.alias: Most Recent Building Code Violation ID
fields.description: {"value":"The record ID of the most recent building code violation for a given parcel. You can use this ID to search the record in the Accela Citizen Access portal.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: lastBuildingCodeViolationDate
fields.alias: Most Recent Building Code Violation Date
fields.description: {"value":"The date the last building code violation was filed.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: numBuildingCodeViolations
fields.alias: Number of Building Code Violations (All time)
fields.description: {"value":"The total number of building code violations for a given parcel, starting in 2015.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: numBuildingCodeViolationsLast6Mo
fields.alias: Number of Building Code Violations (Last 6 months)
fields.description: {"value":"The total number of building code violations for a given parcel in the last 6 months.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: lastRentalRegistrationId
fields.description: {"value":"The record ID of the most recent rental registration record for a given parcel. You can use this ID to search the record in the Accela Citizen Access portal.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: lastRentalRegistrationStatusDate
fields.alias: Most Recent Rental Registration Update Date
fields.description: {"value":"The date the most recently filed rental registration record's status was updated.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: lastRentalRegistrationStatus
fields.description: {"value":"The current status of the most recently filed rental registration record.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: activeRentalRegistrationFlag
fields.description: {"value":"Indicates whether the parcel has an active rental registration in the current year.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: leadSafeCertificateActiveFlag
fields.description: {"value":"A true or false flag indicating whether or not a Lead Safe Certificate is issued for the parcel.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: certOfOccupancyFlag
fields.description: {"value":"A true or false flag indicating whether or not a Certificate of Occupancy is issued for the parcel.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: ownersTotalParcels
fields.alias: Total Parcels Owned by Same Owner
fields.description: {"value":"The total number of parcels owned by this parcel owner.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: publicHealth_violations_alltime
fields.alias: Number of Health Code Violations (All time)
fields.description: {"value":"All CDPH environmental complaints linked to that parcel that have an outcome of Violation Notice Issued,Ticketed, Court Action Filed.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: publicHealth_violations_12mo
fields.alias: Number of Health Code Violations (Last 12 months)
fields.description: {"value":"All CDPH environmental complaints linked to that parcel that have an outcome of Violation Notice Issued,Ticketed, Court Action Filed from the previous 12 months.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: publicHealth_newComplaint_30day
fields.alias: Number of New Health Complaints (Last 30 days)
fields.description: {"value":"All CDPH environmental complaints linked to that parcel that have a status of New from the previous 30 days.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Tract2020
fields.description: {"value":"The 2020 Census Tract GEOID in which the parcel is located.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Tract2010
fields.description: {"value":"The 2010 Census Tract GEOID in which the parcel is located.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: BlockGroup2020
fields.description: {"value":"The 2020 Census Block Group GEOID in which the parcel is located.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Block2020
fields.description: {"value":"The 2020 Census Block GEOID in which the parcel is located.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Neighborhood
fields.description: {"value":"The Neighborhood in which the parcel is located.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Region
fields.description: {"value":"The region in which a parcel is located. A region is defined as a grouping of neighborhoods (such as Far West, South, Northeast, etc.).","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Ward
fields.description: {"value":"The currently active City of Cleveland ward in which the parcel is located.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Ward_2014
fields.description: {"value":"The 2014 City of Cleveland ward in which the parcel is located.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Ward_2026
fields.description: {"value":"The 2026 City of Cleveland ward in which the parcel is located.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: ZIPCTA
fields.description: {"value":"The 2010 Census Zip Code Tabulation Area in which the parcel is located.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: City
fields.description: {"value":"The municipality in which the parcel is located (based on Census designations).","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: County
fields.description: {"value":"The county in which the parcel is located.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: CDCServiceArea
fields.description: {"value":"The city of Cleveland Community Development Corporation (CDC) service area in which the parcel is located. If a parcel falls within multiple CDC service areas, then all CDC service areas are listed, concatenated by a semicolon.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: PrimaryCDC
fields.description: {"value":"The primary City of Cleveland Community Development Corporation (CDC) service area in which the parcel is located. If a parcel falls within multiple CDC service areas, then only the \"primary\" CDC is listed.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Latitude
fields.description: {"value":"The latitude coordinate of the parcel's centroid, represented in the EPSG:4326 Coordinate Reference System.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Longitude
fields.description: {"value":"The longitude coordinate of the parcel's centroid, represented in the EPSG:4326 Coordinate Reference System.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: mail_geocode_addr_all
fields.description: {"value":"Geocoded tax mailing address of the parcel.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: flag_TODZone
fields.alias: Is in Transit Oriented Development Zone
fields.description: {"value":"A true or false flag indicating if a parcel is within the Transit Oriented Development (TOD) zone.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: flag_SESide
fields.description: {"value":"A true or false flag indicating whether or not a parcel is on the Southeast side of Cleveland.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: zoningCode
fields.description: {"value":"Extracts the Zoning Code, Area, and Height of a Parcel based on the zoning district in which it lies.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: zoningUse
fields.description: {"value":"The land use of the associated zoning code.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: zoningArea
fields.description: {"value":"The area restriction of the associated zoning code.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: zoningHeight
fields.description: {"value":"The height restriction of the associated zoning code.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: isSplitZone
fields.description: {"value":"Identifies whether or not a parcel falls across two zoning districts, making it split zoned.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: formBasedCodePilotHood
fields.description: {"value":"The form based code pilot neighborhood of the parcel.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: designReviewDistrict
fields.description: {"value":"The name of the design review district in which the parcel is located.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: designReviewRegion
fields.description: {"value":"The name of the design review region in which the parcel is located.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: formDistrict
fields.description: {"value":"The name of the form district in which the parcel is located.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: isLandmarkParcel
fields.description: {"value":"A true or false flag identifying whether or not a parcel is a landmark.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: landmarkDistrict
fields.description: {"value":"The name of the landmark district in which the parcel is located.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: fifteenMCIndex
fields.description: {"value":"The 15 Minute City Index score of the parcel.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: maxDevelopableArea
fields.description: {"value":"The maximum developable area of a parcel in acres. Developable area is defined as the area of contiguous parcels that are city owned. For example, if two city owned parcels (parcel A and parcel B) are right next to eachother, and if parcel A and parcel B have areas of 1,000 and 1,500 square feet respectively, then the max developable area of both parcel A and B is 2,500 square feet (1,000+1,500).","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: transfers_in_5y
fields.description: {"value":"The number of times a parcel has been sold or transferred in the last 5 years.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: myPlaceLink
fields.description: {"value":"The link to the parcel information place on Cuyahoga County MyPlace.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: valuePerAcre
fields.description: {"value":"The dollar value of a parcel per acre. This is simply the gross total value of the parcel divided by the acreage of the parcel.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: commercialYearBuilt
fields.description: {"value":"If the parcel contains a commercial structure, the year in which that structure was built.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: residentialYearBuilt
fields.description: {"value":"If the parcel contains a residential structure, the year in which that structure was built.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: residentialEffectiveYearBuilt
fields.description: {"value":"If the parcel contains a residential structure, the effective year in which that structure was built. Effective year means if a new parcel had a building constructed on it in 2000, and if that building was torn down and rebuilt in 2010, then the effective year built would be 2010, where the standard year built would be 2000.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: commercialEffectiveYearBuilt
fields.description: {"value":"If the parcel contains a commercial structure, the effective year in which that structure was built. Effective year means if a new parcel had a building constructed on it in 2000, and if that building was torn down and rebuilt in 2010, then the effective year built would be 2010, where the standard year built would be 2000.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: mostRecentYearBuilt
fields.description: {"value":"The year in which a structure was built. The most recent year across all building construction dates.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: mostRecentEffectiveYearBuilt
fields.description: {"value":"The effective year in which a structure was built. The most recent effective year across all building construction dates.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: isCorporateOwner
fields.description: {"value":"This field flags whether a parcel is owned by a corporate entity based on the owner name. If the owner name matches a certain pattern (i.e contains \"LLC\" in the name), then it is flagged as corporate owned. Due to this approach, the field may not perfectly capture all corporate owners in the dataset.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: isOutOfStateOwner
fields.description: {"value":"A true or false flag indicating if the parcel owner is based out of state.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: isCityLandBank
fields.description: {"value":"A true or false flag indicating if the parcel is owned by the City of Cleveland land bank. If the owner name matches a certain pattern (i.e contains \"Cleveland Land Reutilization Program\" in the name), then it is flagged as a land bank property. Due to this approach, the field may not perfectly capture all land bank owned properties in the dataset.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: isCityOwned
fields.description: {"value":"A true or false flag indicating if the parcel is owned by the city. If the owner name matches a certain pattern (i.e contains \"CITY OF CLEVELAND\" in the name), then it is flagged as a city owned property. Due to this approach, the field may not perfectly capture all city owned properties in the dataset.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: isCountyLandBank
fields.description: {"value":"A true or false flag indicating if the parcel is owned by the County land bank.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Survey2015_Category
fields.description: {"value":"Property categories with following values: Vacant Lot, Park, With Adjacent, Vacant Structure, Not Surveyed, Occupied Structure, Parking Lot. From the 2015 Property Survey.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Survey2015_Grade
fields.description: {"value":"Condition of the structure on scale of A (excellent), B (good), C (fair), D (poor), F (extreme). From the 2015 Property Survey.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Survey2015_PhotoLink
fields.description: {"value":"Link to photo taken at time of survey. Note: Most photos do not exist for 2015","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Survey2022_Category
fields.description: {"value":"Property categories with following values: Vacant Lot, Park, With Adjacent, Vacant Structure, Not Surveyed, Occupied Structure, Parking Lot. From the 2022 Property Survey.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Survey2022_Use
fields.description: {"value":"Land uses whith the following values: Commercial, Residential, Industrial, Institutional, Mixed Use, Other. From the 2022 Property Survey.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Survey2022_Grade
fields.description: {"value":"Condition of the structure on scale of A (excellent), B (good), C (fair), D (poor), F (extreme), N/A. From the 2022 Property Survey.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: Survey2022_PhotoLink
fields.description: {"value":"Link to photo taken at time of survey.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: taxDelinquencyAmount
fields.description: {"value":"The total net amount a parcel is tax delinquent.","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: isTaxDelinquent
fields.description: {"value":"A true or false flag indicating if the parcel is tax delinquent or not.","fieldValueType":""}
